description: UI Polish, empty states, error handling, CSS consistency, mobile responsive check + Agent Integration Guide + Version bump to v7.8.0 + Documentation update
steps: Step 1 - Empty States: Review all dashboard panels and ensure each has a proper empty-state message. In index.html, each panel (market-board, hot-tickers-grid, sector-grid, fear-greed-card, movers sections, leaderboard) should show a styled empty message with an icon when data is unavailable. Use a consistent pattern: a muted-color message with a subtle icon (e.g. chart icon) and helpful text like 'Install yfinance for live data' or 'Analyze a stock to see results here'.

Step 2 - JS Error Handling: In dashboard/templates/base.html (or wherever fetchWithTimeout is defined), ensure all fetch calls across all templates have proper .catch() handlers that show a user-friendly toast notification. Grep for any raw fetch() calls without error handling and add catch blocks. Add a global window.onerror handler that shows a toast for uncaught errors.

Step 3 - CSS Consistency: In dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css, ensure all cards use the same border-radius (var(--radius-md)), all buttons use consistent padding and font, all badges use the same font-size and border-radius. Review .card, .btn, .badge, .signal-badge classes for consistency.

Step 4 - Mobile Responsive: In dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css, add/verify @media queries for max-width: 768px and max-width: 480px. Ensure: sidebar collapses to hamburger, grid layouts go to single column, font sizes reduce slightly, hero section adjusts padding.

Step 5 - Agent Integration Guide: Create or update docs/single-persona-integration.md to include clear instructions on how to integrate a single Augur persona agent into external systems like Hermes Agent or OpenClaw. Include: MCP integration (mcp.json config), REST API integration (curl examples), Python SDK integration (code snippet showing how to import and use a single agent). Make it actionable with copy-paste code blocks.

Step 6 - Version Bump: Update version to 7.8.0 in: pyproject.toml (version field), dashboard/app.py (FastAPI version string and status bar Engine value in index.html template context), README.md badge.

Step 7 - CHANGELOG: Update docs/CHANGELOG.md with a comprehensive v7.8.0 entry covering all changes: Fear & Greed gauge, API Token auth, custom persona CRUD, international markets panel, empty states, responsive improvements, agent integration guide.

Step 8 - README: Update README.md and README_EN.md with: (a) v7.8.0 feature table at the top, (b) a comprehensive 'Feature List' section listing ALL features of the project, (c) Docker deployment section (docker-compose up), (d) API Token configuration. Keep existing content intact, just add the new sections.
Step 9 - Final commit: All changes committed with Chinese commit message.
acceptance_criteria: All dashboard panels show graceful empty states with helpful messages
No JavaScript fetch calls without error handling
CSS uses consistent variables for spacing, colors, radii
Mobile layout works at 768px and 480px breakpoints
docs/single-persona-integration.md has complete MCP/REST/SDK integration guide
Version is 7.8.0 in pyproject.toml, app.py, README badge
README.md and README_EN.md have complete Feature List section
